opinion.h4: RATIGAN ET AL. v. DAVIS ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEBRASKA. No. 547. Decided January 6, 1964.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
William R. King and Seymour L. Smith for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h4: SPATT v. CITY OF NEW YORK, 375 U.S. 394 (1964)
opinion.p: 375 U.S. 394 SPATT v. CITY OF NEW YORK ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 562. Decided January 6, 1964.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Leo A. Larkin, Stanley Buchsbaum and Solomon Portnow for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
